creator: hroi@asdf.dk
text:
This broke crop and resize for me :-(

The following used to provide a section of a window resized to 160x120, but now
I get a non-cropped, full-size image:

import -display 0:0 -window 0x60002c -crop 800x600+2+14 -geometry '160x120!' test.jpg

-- 
Hroi Sigurdsson                                 hroi@asdf.dk
